---
title: "タイトル"
subtitle: "サブタイトル"
pagetitle: "Rmarkdown設定テンプレート"
# date: "`r Sys.time()`"
abstract: "このドキュメントのアブストラクトをここに入力します。"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 5
    toc_float: TRUE
    number_sections: TRUE
    code_folding: "show"
    highlight: "default"
    theme: "flatly"
    css: ../style.css
---


```{r SETUP, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo       = TRUE,
                      message    = FALSE,
                      warning    = FALSE,
                      out.width  = 800,
                      out.height = 600,
                      fig.align  = "center",
                      dev        = "ragg_png")
```

# Head1
## a
## b
## c

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

```{r}
library(prophet)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

base_url <- 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/facebook/prophet/master/examples/'
data_path <- paste0(base_url, 'example_wp_log_peyton_manning.csv')
df <- readr::read_csv(data_path)

m <- prophet(df %>% sample_n(100))
future <- make_future_dataframe(m, periods = 365)
forecast <- predict(m, future)
```

# head1
## plotA

```{r}
plot(m, forecast)
```

## plotB

```{r}
# figA
dyplot.prophet(m, forecast)
```

#### head4

```{r}
tibble(airquality)
```


```{r}
knitr::kable(mtcars, 
             digits = 4,
             align = "llllccccrrrr",
             caption = "An example table caption.")
```
##### head5

これは$\alpha$です。

$$
\begin{eqnarray}
|x|
 =
  \begin{cases}
    x & ( x \geqq 0 ) \\
    -x & ( x \lt 0 )
  \end{cases}
\end{eqnarray}
$$

$$
\idotsint_D f(x_1, x_2, \ldots , x_n) dx_1 \cdots dx_n
$$

# 2カラムデザイン

<div class="column-left">
## Left hand side
```{r}
sample(iris$Sepal.Length, 10)
```
```{r out.width = 400, out.height = 200}
hist(iris$Sepal.Length, main = "Left side")
```
</div>

<div class="column-right">
## Right hand side
```{r }
hist(iris$Sepal.Length, main = "Right side")
```
</div>

## イメージ

![Sunset Image](/Users/aki/Documents/statistical_note/note00/sunset.jpg "Sunset Image")


更新日：`r Sys.time()`
